items.caption: A stylized, flat 3d illustration of a smartphone displaying a voting interface. the phone is set against a light gray background. the smartphone screen shows a voting app with a voting box icon, a voting paper, and a voting time of 08:30 on monday. the word "voting" is prominently displayed in bold, green letters at the bottom of the screen. the overall style of the image is modern and digital, with a focus on the theme of digital voting.
